requirement_topic.en: EMC and Radio Approval for Cordless Tools
requirement_topic.zh: 电磁兼容与无绳工具无线电审批
requirement_topic.zht: 電磁相容與無繩工具無線電審批

summary.en: Kenya does not rely on a broad single EMC mark for all power tools. For tools with radio transmitters (for example Bluetooth or similar cordless connectivity), Communications Authority of Kenya approval is the practical radio gate; non-radio EMC effects are handled through product safety and technical evidence in the KEBS process. No EU-style standalone EMC noise-style or CE-style universal mandatory EMC mark is generally confirmed as a separate market-access condition for all Kenyan power tools.
summary.zh: 肯尼亚未采用覆盖所有电动工具的统一单一EMC标志。对于含无线电发射模块（如蓝牙或其他无绳连接）的工具，通信管理局（CA）审批是实际的无线电门槛；无无线电的EMC要求则在KEBS流程中的产品安全技术证据中处理。一般未确认存在对全部肯尼亚电动工具适用的欧盟式独立EMC噪声型或通用强制EMC标志要求。
summary.zht: 肯尼亞未採用覆蓋所有電動工具的統一單一EMC標誌。對於含無線電發射模組（如藍牙或其他無線連接）的工具，通信管理局（CA）審批是實際的無線電門檻；無無線電情況下的EMC要求則在KEBS流程中的產品安全技術證據中處理。一般未確認存在對全部肯尼亞電動工具適用的歐盟式獨立EMC噪聲型或通用強制EMC標誌要求。

standards_or_laws: Communication and radio requirements administered by Communications Authority of Kenya
KEBS technical safety and conformity framework
No confirmed mandatory EU-style standalone EMC product mark for all power tools in Kenya

summary.en: China often maps EMC through GB/T or equivalent IEC routes and radio modules through SRRC-related pathways. Those domestic files can support technical review but do not replace Kenya CA checks where a radio transmitter is part of the cordless tool.
summary.zh: 中国通常通过GB/T或等同IEC路径映射EMC，电台模块常通过SRRC相关渠道。国内文件可用于技术评审，但当无绳工具含无线发射模块时不能替代肯尼亚CA检查。
summary.zht: 中國通常透過GB/T或等同IEC路徑映射EMC，電台模組常通過SRRC相關通道。國內文件可用作技術審查，但當無繩工具含無線發射模組時不能替代肯尼亞CA審查。

standards_or_laws: GB/T EMC and radio test references

gap.en: A common gap is assuming domestic EMC or SRRC-type approval covers Kenya import readiness. The practical gap is adding specific CA radio handling for cordless models while keeping EMC scope aligned to the marketed kit and not relying on a China-only report for Kenya entry.
gap.zh: 常见差距是将国内EMC或SRRC类型核准视为肯尼亚入市充分条件。实际差距在于对无绳型号增加CA无线电处理，并使EMC范围与实际销售配置一致，而非依赖仅中国的报告。
gap.zht: 常見差距是將國內EMC或SRRC型號核准視為肯尼亞入市充分條件。實際差距在於對無繩型號增加CA無線電處理，並使EMC範圍與實際銷售組態一致，而非依賴僅中國的報告。

target.en: Mandatory requirement: CA radio compliance path when radio transmission is present in the cordless product. No confirmed EU-style standalone EMC mandatory mark is reported for all power tools; EMC is handled within applicable safety and conformity evidence.
target.zh: 强制要求：无绳工具若包含无线发射功能，需执行CA无线电合规路径。未确认所有电动工具都受欧盟式独立EMC强制标志约束；EMC通常随相关安全与符合性证据处理。
target.zht: 強制要求：無繩工具若包含無線發射功能，需履行CA無線電合規路徑。未確認所有電動工具都受歐盟式獨立EMC強制標誌約束；EMC通常隨相關安全與符合性證據處理。

cn.en: China EMC and SRRC evidence is useful for technical comparison but is not a standalone Kenya radio-entry substitute.
cn.zh: 中国EMC与SRRC证据可用于技术比较，但不足以替代肯尼亚无线电入门槛。
cn.zht: 中國EMC與SRRC證據可用於技術比較，但不足以替代肯尼亞無線電入門檻。

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Not Kenya-ready until cordless products with transmitters are routed through the appropriate CA approval path and all marketed configurations are covered in the technical file for Kenya entry.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 含发射模块的无绳产品在通过适当CA审批路径并在技术文件中覆盖全部销售配置前，不能视为肯尼亚就绪。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 含發射模組的無繩產品在通過適當CA審批路徑並在技術文件中覆蓋全部銷售組態前，不能視為肯尼亞就緒。
